title: PCH breaks ccache in the CI
body:
Since the PCH patch (for verilator itself) landed, ccache in the CI 'build' step is reporting high miss rates and is notably slower to compile Verilator on a rebuild. Note locally ccache seems to work fine, but in the CI we fetch the cache archive from the previous run.

Here is the ccache log for an arbitrary file that should have been in the cache. Looks like the hashes are completely off.

```
[2023-10-21T12:01:02.549638 7703 ] === CCACHE 4.5.1 STARTED =========================================
```
